code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test09-DEC-2021Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, marked proteinuria), hypoglycemia, and low HbA1c, suggesting possible chronic kidney disease with poor glycemic control or malnutrition. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria) further support renal dysfunction and possible hepatic involvement. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and assessment for underlying metabolic or hepatic disorders.
